meaning: adj.深海的,海洋上的,靠近海洋的
examples: The oil slick resulted from an accident at the Deepwater Horizon rig in the Gulf of Mexico.
Just how much oil has spilled from Deepwater Horizon?
Deepwater Horizon's failure demoralized the whole nation.
Look for Apache to sell off some of these deepwater fields as the year goes on.
The Deepwater Horizon incident appears destined to have a similar or even greater impact.
